subject: fix(review): email validation, timer cleanup, focus restore, keys
body:
- Fix email length check to validate trimmed value (validation.ts)
- Clear error auto-dismiss timer when user manually dismisses error
  in InterestForm (prevents redundant setState after unmount)
- Restore focus to trigger element when InstallInstructionsModal
  closes (WCAG 2.4.3 focus order)
- Show fallback message in modal when browser has no install steps
  (Firefox Desktop returns empty steps array)
- Switch About and TimelineItem to index-based keys with prefixes
  to avoid collision on duplicate content strings

Tags: bugfix, a11y, validation, focus, wcag
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review
Semver: patch
